consistency_check.hit_die_format: Error detected: 'hit_die' is stored as a number (12) but the expected format for archival consistency is a string representing the die type (e.g., 'd12'). This matches the ZOD error description.

consistency_check.proficiency_structure: Proficiency choices are listed as an array of strings. Armor, weapon, and tool proficiencies are also arrays of strings.

quality_assessment.data_completeness: High. All expected fields for a class definition appear to be present.
